sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115069" key="xrwsth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρωστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n115069.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that which colours</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dyes</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χ. μόλυβος</foreign> a lead-<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pencil,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.68</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Jul.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
